caption:
Your Facebook lead form works.

Someone taps the ad, fills it out, and Meta logs the submission the moment it happens.

The delay hits one step later. Most teams only see the lead when someone remembers to open Ads Manager or export a CSV.

Test it this week: have a friend or employee submit your live lead ad. Time how long it takes anyone from your business to reply. Response-time research shows contact and close rates drop fast once that first hour passes.

The fix lives inside Meta. Open your Instant Form, tap Integrations, and connect it to a CRM. Leads route the second they submit, no manual export required.

Black Arrow's platform catches every lead source in one inbox and can text back automatically within seconds. Run it on your own pipeline for 14 days, no card required.

DM TRIAL

#leadgeneration #speedtolead #metaads #homeservicesmarketing #crmautomation
rationale: Meta Instant Form leads log instantly but sit unseen until someone manually checks Ads Manager, a genuine speed-to-lead gap this account hasn't covered, taught with a real test and the native CRM fix.
